g.text: AI Flow — Pipeline
What happens inside the classification engine, step by step
Normalize input
Clean text, strip dots/spaces from code. Is the code complete, partial, or missing?
App Service
Classify Boost
Sparse description? Enrich it — material, use case, brand category
Azure OpenAI · AI Foundry prompt flow
if input is sparse — otherwise skip
Retrieve
Pull matching HS codes, tariff rules, section notes, and similar past cases
Azure AI Search · hybrid vector + keyword
Rank candidates
Apply HS interpretation rules — specificity, essential character, subheading logic
Azure OpenAI · AI Foundry prompt flow
Score confidence
Input completeness + match quality + rule clarity + prior similarity. Low → human review
App Service · routing logic
Generate Arabic description
Map HS code to Arabic tariff name. Append words to avoid ZATCA exact-match rejection
HSCodeMaster lookup
Persist with audit trail
Store HS code, confidence, reasoning chain, evidence. Feedback loop from human corrections
PostgreSQL · App Insights
